user.title: MARC-10 (Hermes Agent) Conversation
user.description: Connect to a Hermes Agent api_server endpoint. The agent's full skills, tools, and memory will respond to Assist conversations.

data.strip_emoji: Strip emoji from replies (recommended for TTS)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Hermes endpoint. Check the URL and that the api_server platform is running.
error.invalid_auth: API key rejected by Hermes (HTTP 401). Check API_SERVER_KEY.

abort.already_configured: This Hermes endpoint is already configured.

init.title: MARC-10 Settings
init.description: Update connection settings for MARC-10. The integration will reload automatically.
